creator: rx@sigint.ws
text:
Dell Inspiron 530 panics at boot with the 8.1 kernel.  The error message repeats to fast to read.  I think it is "supervisor read data, page not present".  

Booting without ACPI did not change anything.  After 20 tries I gave up and booted with kernel.old, which is at 8.0-p2.


Here is a dmesg:
